articles.title: KR Puram triple murder case: Bengaluru techie's lover arrested in Puducherry
articles.excerpt: Bengaluru police have arrested J Kenneth, live-in partner of techie M Shwetha, in Puducherry in connection with a brutal triple murder. The victims, a family of three, were allegedly killed over a financial dispute involving Shwetha's substantial unpaid bank …
